title: Mark twitter-thread and marketing-cluster skills as keep-under-review with telemetry gate
summary: Apply explicit keep-under-review labels to selected domain/marketing skills and require telemetry before any removal decision.
details:
Implement conservative governance for domain-specific marketing/content skills.

Scope:
1. Add keep-under-review note to `skills/twitter-thread/SKILL.md`.
2. Add matching review-gate note to marketing-cluster skills currently treated as candidates for future pruning (at minimum `skills/competitor-profile/SKILL.md`, `skills/website-intelligence/SKILL.md`, `skills/landing-page-blueprint/SKILL.md`, and `skills/email-composer/SKILL.md`).
3. State that deprecation/removal requires usage telemetry evidence rather than static audit alone.

Acceptance:
- Each targeted skill includes a concise review-gate note.
- No deprecations/removals performed in this pass.

diffPreview:
+ Add governance note: keep under review, require telemetry before any deprecation/removal.
~ No functional skill behavior removed.
estimatedImpact: Prevents premature removal of potentially valuable user-facing skills while documenting governance policy.
executorPrompt: Edit `skills/twitter-thread/SKILL.md`, `skills/competitor-profile/SKILL.md`, `skills/website-intelligence/SKILL.md`, `skills/landing-page-blueprint/SKILL.md`, and `skills/email-composer/SKILL.md` to add a concise keep-under-review note that future deprecation/removal requires usage telemetry evidence. Do not alter core skill instructions beyond this governance note. Return the exact note text used.
